manufactured_scalar_nk.mathematical_statement: For p(r)=Y0-(1-Z0)r+Z2*r^2, the supplied radius interval has p(r)<0 throughout it.

mathematical_statement: For the manufactured scalar Newton-Kantorovich example with Y0=0, Z0=0.1, Z2=0.1, the scalar radii polynomial p(r)=Y0-(1-Z0)r+Z2*r^2 is strictly negative on the certified radius interval, so the infrastructure acceptance path can record a passing toy certificate.
scope: infrastructure-only manufactured scalar NK positive control
